reviews.text: I went here for help after my children  accident, and they assisted me very promptly. They explained everything clearly so I could understand, and they made sure I didn’t have to worry about anything. The whole process was smooth and well taken care of — all I really had to do was get my children to their appointments and fill out a few forms. It was an awesome experience. Thank you, Maeve!

After being rearended at a stop light, I reached out to Lozoya Law and asked for help. Maeve and her team were amazing! Throughout the process I kept saying I wouldn't get anything back in way of settlement. Maeve assured me that was not the case and not to worry. I. WAS. BLOWN. AWAY at the end result. My final settlement was enough to pay off credit card debt, travel, enjoy some personal spending, purchase a home, decorate and furnish it, and put money in savings! I know each case is different with different results, but I believe Maeve worked miracles with my personal situation, and the outcome was shocking. Maeve explained each leg of the process, answered any additional questions I had, listened to my fears and frustration, and kept in contact throughout my case. She is kind, trustworthy, attentive, thorough, knowledge, very capable, and a go getter! She has integrity, ethics that she stands by, and is extremely attentive to all details. I will definitely use her and her firm again if needed. Lozoya Law is an up and coming law firm to watch. They/She is the absolute BEST in Arizona! Don't hesitate to partner with Lozoya Law and get the support, guidance, and results you deserve!! Thank you so much, Maeve! You literally changed my life!

I had an incredible experience with this law firm. From the very beginning, Maeve was professional, attentive, and genuinely cared about helping me. What stood out the most was how clearly she explained everything in terms I could easily understand something that can be rare when dealing with legal matters. She guided me through every step of the process, answered all of my questions patiently, and made sure I felt supported and informed the entire time.

Maeve was not only knowledgeable but also compassionate, which made a stressful situation much easier to handle. She worked diligently on my case, kept me updated, and ensured I had the confidence that things were being handled properly. I truly felt like they had my best interests at heart.

I’m extremely grateful for her and the firms help and would highly recommend this firm to anyone in need of legal assistance. They made a difficult situation much less overwhelming, and I can’t thank them enough for their guidance and dedication.

I can’t thank Maeve enough for her incredible support after my collision. I initially didn’t think I needed to seek treatment right away, but I quickly realized how important it was — and I’m so glad I did. I ended up needing physical therapy multiple times a week for a neck injury, which severely impacted my ability to work and manage my daily life. As someone who works in administration, being sidelined was especially challenging. Maeve was a true advocate, helping me navigate the insurance process, managing communication, and supporting me during months without a vehicle. I usually consider myself pretty good at advocating for myself, but during this time, I was completely depleted. Maeve’s guidance and care made all the difference. Highly recommend her legal expertise and compassionate approach.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you so much for trusting our office to handle your case as we know how stressful it can be. We are happy that you were satisfied with the level of service you received and the outcome of your case.

reviews.text: Genesis Injury and Accident Lawyers are top notch. Their experience is unmatched.

I was in a car accident last year and my spouse and I were severely injured. Our medical insurance wasn't enough to pay all the cost of the doctor's visits and the surgeons. We didn't know what to do. We didn't want to take money from the insurance company but were unsure. We also didn't want to hire a personal injury lawyer for our car accident case because we felt they were all the same, the slimy only want money kind. We met with one of the lawyers at Hogle injury law near our home in Surprise and we didn't know that lawyers could be this cool. He was so friendly and warm, nothing like what I had expected.

We worked for a little over a year getting out health back to near where it was over a year ago pre car accident. During the process, the office kept us up-to-date with our case. They helped us find doctors and surgeons that would wait to get paid until our case was settled. They all were so great. Today we were in the Surprise office to get our settlement check and had a nice visit with the lawyers and their staff. I will always recommend them to anyone I know that is in a car accident or that needs a personal injury lawyer.

My mom got into a car accident and we didn't feel we were being treated fairly by the insurance company. We spoke to a lot of car accident lawyers and felt the best about this one. We haven't settled our case yet but they are taking real good care of us so far.

reviews.text:
I retained The Dodds Law Firm, PLC in early 2025 for my child custody and support case. I initially worked with Michelle Herro, who was knowledgeable and made me feel confident. Unfortunately, she left the firm midway, followed by multiple paralegal changes, creating significant inconsistency that left me uneasy.
I was reassigned to Dan Dodds, and the problems started to escalate. Communication was poor: responses were delayed, indirect, and filled with lengthy, off-topic tangents. I often had to redirect him just to get clear answers to my questions.
Despite providing all requested documentation promptly, my case did not appear thoroughly reviewed. Mr. Dodds was unaware of key details, including my child support hearing where I explicitly wanted representation. He was absent minded during
the hearing, remained silent when the mediator called on him repeatedly, and provided no meaningful advocacy.
Most troubling, he proposed imputing a wage on me, resulting in an order for me to pay child support—directly contrary to my goals and best interests. The case dragged on unnecessarily until late 2025, with a disappointing outcome.
I do not recommend Dan Dodds or this firm for custody matters. If you’re seeking consistent, focused, and effective representation, look elsewhere.

reviews.ownerResponse: We appreciate your five star review and informing others who need legal representation how you feel about our law firm.

reviews.text: This review is a reflection of my opinion about the terrible/awful experience I had with this law firm. The decision to hire Dodds law firm was a regrettable and unfortunate one. The consultations I had with Dan Dodds aimed to persuade and convince that he has solutions and answers to my legal matters. Once I signed on and paid the retainer fees, the solutions went out of the window, and become insensible and unadvisable. He made some promising resolutions during the consultation only to secure a client. Then He later denied he never made, that’s when I realized I was lured into a trap, and deliberately misled and misguided, my true intentions and what I intended to do were rerouted and he ultimately pursued a course of action that is differs from my desired outcome, rooted in dishonesty, neglect can be used as a dishonest tactic to avoid obligations. Dan Dodds failed to act on time sensitive court orders; he failed to act with reasonable diligence and promptness in dealing with my case. Which resulted in missing out the chance for a positive resolution. Dan’s procrastination and unwillingness to move forward and waiting longer then necessary in my case left me feeling out of control and helpless. He failed to take timely and swift legal action. Additionally I suffered unnecessary anxiety and stress due to him playing fast and loose with headlines the client's vulnerability and distress are exploited, and preyed upon by this firm. I ended up paying thousands of dollars in legal fees, Ultimately I am still at square one. He established a corrupt system where he marking up time by inflating the hours spent on a case. Prolonging a legal process unnecessarily to maximize fees, abusing his position where the client is compelled to accept and pay for unnecessary services, his fees are excessive, exorbitant, unreasonable designed to Deplete the client’s trust account and ensure that the client will not receive any refund from the payments made to the firm. There is a lack of financial transparency in the firm's billing practices difficult to detect without careful scrutiny of itemized bills. Charging excessive. Unconscionable fees for reviewing file repeatedly or reviewing the same information multiple times. Billing at their high rate for the administrative task of simply organizing or finding files, the firm over billing often masked by vague time entries like “work on file” or “review documents”. Lawyers have an ethical obligation to keep their clients reasonably informed about the status of their cases. However, Poor communication, neglecting client, not returning calls, failing to keep client informed about their case, are some of the unethical practices I experienced at dodds law firm. Taking a look back at the terrible experience I had, you must ask yourself, is that who you want to represent you and handle your case during the critical time in your life? The answer that is both intelligent and wise is (I don’t believe so). I don’t recommend this law firm to anyone, its untrustworthy and lacks integrity it should be investigated for unethical practices. Don’t be fooled by the fake paid reviews, I sincerely doubt if all of the positive reviews are legitimate and genuine. If you hire this law firm you will be lighting fire on your money and burning a hole in your wallet, you will set yourself up for a financial ruin you will be overwhelmed and drowned in fees and charges that exceed your expectations.my advise is to stay away from this firm, and think twice Before making a decision to hire a firm that will start draining your hard earned money and leave you high and dry.
reviews.ownerResponse: Given that an invisible "Ghost" appears to have written this nasty, misleading review, I will allow those looking for a respectable, moral, and hardworking legal team to represent their best interests in a legal proceeding to judge its worth.

reviews.text: If I could rate a zero, I would. I have waited to post this review since I needed the last of my financial paperwork to be completed. I interviewed Mr. Dodds about my divorce and he was compassionate, sympathetic and "a Christian" and would help me deal with my divorce where I had been financially abused for decades. Turns out, had I researched deeper, I would find this is his way of signing clients, only to turn them over to incompetent "jr lawyers". I was handed over to William Welch and the drain of my money began... nearly $30K in attorney costs and billing that didn't match what I was getting. I repeatedly had to call and question charges. Welch was beyond incompetent, telling me things wouldn't rule in my favor "because the judge just doesn't like him." The problem was the judge was holding him accountable for doing his job. I got handed nearly the highest alimony rate allowed, was told I could petition for marital waste ... it was just lie after lie. I believe he was in cahoots with my husband's attorney, who was equally as incompetent. The bills came left and right and zero progression on my case. Stalling ... and more stalling. Then magically Welch leaves the firm. No notice, no nothing. My case handed to TJ Coons who told me it wasn't his fault he got brought into the case late. Mr. Dodds no where in sight. I received a letter shortly after signing up with him that he was "retiring" and because of his health issues, he could no longer represent clients. But it appears he continues to take in clients. Had I read the reviews that I ended up reading later, I would have seen this bait and switch he has pulled on several clients. Interesting, when I started complaining, all of a sudden all these 5 star reviews started appearing about the firm. In the office, they openly solicit reviews ... I would challenge that many must be fake. There's too many that happened all at one time. I ended up firing the firm, went pro se - and magically got my divorce completed on my own within 30 days. I wasted so much money with this firm. It was a complete disgrace they are allowed to prey on people the way they do - Mr. Dodds saw a broken woman with a failed marriage of 34 years and saw I had some money and proceeded to take as much of it as he could. William Welch - buyer beware. He left the firm, but I hope this review comes up with people google for him ... he was in over his head from day 1 and worthless. I had to read the law to him on more than one occasion. A waste of time and energy. Lies and false expectations is the name of this firm. Again, buyers beware. Not that I trust any attorney, but I would never in a million years recommend this firm to anyone unless you have money to just give away.
reviews.ownerResponse: I read Ms. Mills' recent review, in which she expressed her disappointment with our firm. While the vast majority of our clients report that their experience working with our firm was positive and much appreciated, it appears we missed the mark in resolving her case to Ms. Mills' satisfaction. Nevertheless, I thank Miss Mills for sharing her opinion that we failed to provide her with the positive experience we strive to give every client. That being said, I thank Ms. Mills for taking the time to share her experience with others. Nonetheless, Ms. Mills never shared her concerns about her representation with me, which prevented me from promptly addressing the issues she outlined in her review. Nevertheless, I sincerely apologize for the frustration she expressed in her review. In a good-faith effort to address her concerns, I would like to invite Ms. Mills to contact my office as soon as possible so that I can personally meet and discuss her concerns.
Thank you, Kohl, for the 5-star Review. I am glad you felt treated like one of our VIPs because you are!

We also didn't want to hire a personal injury lawyer for our car accident case because we felt they were all the same, the slimy only want money kind. We met with one of the lawyers at Hogle injury law near our home in Surprise and we didn't know that lawyers could be this cool. He was so friendly and warm, nothing like what I had expected.

We worked for a little over a year getting out health back to near where it was over a year ago pre car accident. During the process, the office kept us up-to-date with our case. They helped us find doctors and surgeons that would wait to get paid until our case was settled. They all were so great. Today we were in the Surprise office to get our settlement check and had a nice visit with the lawyers and their staff. I will always recommend them to anyone I know that is in a car accident or that needs a personal injury lawyer.

Joel Thurston sent an email saying that both me and my wife at the time (who was his client) would be broke at the end of the My experience with Joel Thurston during my divorce was very negative. He told me and my wife at the time that we would both end up broke at the end of the process — and unfortunately, that turned out to be true. In my view, the case was drawn out unnecessarily for t
About two years and left both sides financially drained.

I personally filed several state bar complaints because I felt his conduct was not in the best interest of his client. From my perspective, the legal fees consumed all of my ex-wife’s share from the sale of the house, and she was left with nothing after the case. Once the funds were gone, he ended the representation.

In my opinion, this was a very damaging and disappointing experience, and I would caution others to carefully consider their options before hiring him. ter
reviews.ownerResponse:
Genesis insurance, would you mind posting the actual full email you mention and the results of your bar complaints? You would not be the first nor the last opposing party I have cautioned about choosing to litigate unnecessarily. When a person chooses to go to war in a lawsuit, there is a cost. Sometimes the price isn’t worth it…
When opposing parties post reviews, it may be because they have not received the ruling they want in court and may have been ordered to pay my fees for their conduct. Do you mind sharing if you were ordered by the court to pay my fees?

reviews.text: Very poor experience. The process took far longer than necessary, communication was minimal, and the fees were far higher than expected. I did not feel the firm acted in my best interests. I would not recommend their services.
I had a very bad experience with Joel Thurston. He only cares about money and milking his clients much as possible. I would stay far away
reviews.ownerResponse: I believe this post is mistaken or not a real person, as I don't have any clients by this name, and I looked back over two years.  Regardless, "jenny" you are correct that I care about money, sometimes too much.  I struggle to balance running a business with employees to pay and numerous bills associated with successfully operating a law firm and seeking to obtain justice for people of all incomes and abilities to pay.  I try to be as reasonable as possible.  I feel we deliver exceptional service for an efficient and fair price, albeit we are not cheap.  As the adage goes, you do often get what you pay for.  Additionally, as an attorney and counselor, I often deliver difficult truth to clients and potential clients based upon their facts and how the law applies to their situation.  Sometimes they don't like what I have to say as their legal advisor, and that they have paid me to tell them something other than what they want to hear.  I am not always right.  I'm imperfect in so many ways, but I will never represent someone and tell them what they want to hear when I believe their position is unreasonable and legally unsupported.  Anyone who knows me knows that your defamatory allegation stating I "only" care about money is false.  Similarly, "milking" my clients as "much as possible" is an untenable business model for someone in the customer service industry.  You are wrong and these are legally defamatory allegations.  Although we cannot please everyone, thankfully rarely do clients dispute the validity of their bills.  In my experience, typically this kind of complaint is from an opposing party that is upset they lost to our team in court or a client or potential client that doesn't listen to our advice and they end up getting sanctioned by the court (a common litigation sanction is paying attorney's fees for the prevailing party).  "Jenny" if you are a real person, would you mind stating if are you a disgruntled prior opposing party?  Or would you state whether you ended up being required to pay the attorney's fees of the other party in your matter?  If you are willing to respond, please include your case number, if there is one, so that we can at least know this is a post by a real person.  If you got the state bar involved, please state what the conclusion was from that.  Your response to these questions will at least let us know you are real, and if you are and this review expresses your feelings about me, I am truly sorry you feel this way.    Although I don't find my identity in what people think about me, your allegations are the opposite of the character I hope to be known for, and I do truly wish you all God's best.

reviews.text: Joel and his team did a fantastic job helping me and my family during our stressful time. Thank you again Joel and may God continue to bless you and your team!

From Sean Carey, Legal Counsel, Hannah Noble, Paralegal to the Firm, and Jamie Hayes, Office  Manager,  their incredible support from the initial connection to now has been beyond outstanding. reviews.text: Jeremy Goad is honest and really knowledgeable with law! He took the time to hear me. He listened and was able to make me understand things I didn't. Law isn't easy to understand. He explained everything from start to finish. Jeremy definitely is my go to with any questions! I highly recommend him! Also I love the phone appointment availability. It makes it more convenient. Thank you for getting me scheduled via email as well. I appreciate you all! Thank you again Jeremy!!
Both Jeremy and Sean have been extremely professional and helpful during my time working with their law firm. Very happy with the results so far.

I have to say, I read the reviews and thought they could help me. However, I left a message one day in the early afternoon, never received a return call. The following morning I left another message saying that if I don’t get a callback, I will move onto the next attorney. I got an immediate call back. I briefly explained the mess my life is in and how I would need multiple services from them. And all she could tell me is that I would need to speak to an attorney and the only way to do that is $150. So I’m left not even knowing if they would be able to handle the multiple situation’s that I’m in, unless I pay them $150. She was like a robot talking to me!
reviews.ownerResponse: Tami, I appreciate your feedback and I apologize you did not feel heard.  We are here to listen and help, but we do require a $150 consultation fee so that we can actually take the time to listen to a potential client and analyze their case, providing meaningful legal feedback, and not simply a sales pitch.  If we didn’t charge the $150 fee, our attorneys could spend their whole day meeting with people for free, which would not be profitable for the firm or the potential clients.  Most of the feedback we typically receive is that places that offer a free consultation often involve non-attorneys meeting with potential clients and more of a sales pitch. That is not our philosophy.  Additionally, while our legal receptionist is knowledgeable about various legal matters, she is not an attorney and not able to analyze your case.  That is why she wanted you to meet with an attorney. That is the best way that she could help you. Again, I apologize that you did not feel heard and felt like you were speaking to a robot. We appreciate the constructive criticism and we will continue to strive to do better. We wish you the best!

reviews.text: Everyone at KTO has always been very kind and professional.  I’ve referred numerous people to my attorney, Jeremy Goad.  He and all of his staff are wonderful.

Personal thanks to Ryan Hodges for his diligence, patience and professional demeanor in what took dramatically longer (through no fault of the firm) than it should have. reviews.text:
I was knocked unconscious in a car wreck in October 2023 while stopped at a red light.  My car and the car that hit me were both totaled.  Despite wearing my seatbelt, I woke up in the back of my hatchback, with only my feet tangled in the belt and my arm trapped between the back seats. I barely remember the impact.

I spent the next 12 hours in a crowded ER and got excellent news: it was only minor injuries and a concussion.  I went home the next morning.

My uncle, a retired lawyer, specifically referred me to Burg Simpson because of their reputation for being thorough in their work and good with clients.

My recovery was a very long process despite only having non-surgical injuries that could be treated with physical therapy.  Some weeks were just stacks of tests and doctor's appointments.  And all of this after the confusion of hitting my head.  The value of having someone I'd send paperwork to, and they could track down so much information!  It was impressive.   I still have no idea how they sorted everything out, but I was given updates on everything throughout the process.   Everyone was very kind.  The staff I worked with the most were Rachel Denning, Alta, and Ed Parra.  While I really appreciate all the hard work, they were also incredible.    I know they are so busy, but they always stopped to ask if I felt okay.

They managed so many bills for me, straight away.  It really made things simple.   And they always made sure i knew exactly what was being paid, when and how.  They really utilized email, text and phone very well.

I had many questions about my car insurance since the other driver had minimum coverage.  I was so worried that mine wouldn't even cover my expenses.   I had just moved and changed insurance over the weekend, I didn't even know which insurance to file with!  They answered so many questions that were specific to my needs.  They didn't just give me superficial information.

Overall, the results far exceeded my expectations.  But, in reality, the best value over the last 18 months has been the customer service, care, and peace of mind that they were taking care of so much stuff that I didn't have to worry.   My uncle seriously didn't give them the credit they deserved.

I hope nobody has to read this review because they are going through the same endless nightmare. But let's be honest, this is Arizona, and I was lucky. Unfortunately, most people need much more care after a wreck. If you are ever in need, know that you, your family, or your friends will be cared for during their whole recovery.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thanks for the stellar review, Amanda.

He provided valuable information, gave me peace of mind, and took the time to refer me to several other attorneys who could help. Their professionalism, knowledge, and willingness to help—even without direct benefit—truly stood out. I highly recommend Ed Parra and Burg Simpson to anyone in need of legal guidance.

reviews.text: Doug, Liam and Melissa I'd definitely recommend to someone if they ever needed a injury Lawyer! After getting into a car Accident in March, I thought I was able to handle things my way not thinking I'd have to lawyer up. The insurance at fault wasn't doing anything to help after having my only mode of transportation taken away from me I couldn't even get a rental. After asking 3 times and being rejected I was offered a few measly dollars to settle my case. After hearing the amount I felt offended be cause at this point the insurance didn't care for my well being so I went lawyer shopping. Called a few a of the big names advertised around town to get some information and found out how slick of of them are by saying 'We are gonna email you some documents for you to read and sign and we'll get started on your case.' Not explaining what the process will be. After speaking with Liam he was able to give me a break down on the details and how this could be a lengthy process so it will take a lot of patience on my end. Liam was able to set me up with Doug that was going to take on my case and that's if I chose to have Gerber represent me. I'm glad I made the choice! From Melissa to Liam to Doug I was kept in the loop at all times. We got to point to where my case hit a snag. I wasn't getting better my finances was pretty much exhausted. The Team was able to assist me in getting help and treatment that I didn't know I needed. For 6 to 7 months I didn't know I was walking around with a fracture in my leg that required surgery. Doug and his team was able to find me a Doctor willing to take on my case working on a Lein so that I wouldn't have to come out of pocket. Again I was kept in the loop at all times and I got the surgery and treatment I needed. I was very happy they way I was represented and taken care of by Gerber. Just make sure to be safe and buckle up when driving. Also keep in mind accidents happen.

reviews.text:
If you want the best, don’t call the rest! Call Paul Dombeck.
My wife was recently denied twice for SSDI (at the Initial and Reconsideration Level). She then requested a Hearing before an Administrative Law Judge and wanted attorney representation for that Level. We both then took on the task of finding an attorney to represent her. Between us, we called 15+ attorneys (local and national) to see if they would take my wife’s case. ALL 15+ attorneys declined because of the unique circumstances surrounding the case and my wife’s rare medical condition. We almost gave up and were very concerned my wife would have to go before a judge without legal representation. It was then we found Paul Dombeck by chance. He was highly knowledgeable of the SSDI claims process and compassionate about my wife’s medical condition. We dealt with both Paul and Tatiana leading up to the Hearing, and they were both quick to answer any questions we had. Paul did an excellent job explaining the Hearing process to put my wife’s mind at ease. Long story short, my wife received a Fully Favorable Decision, and that was all down to Paul and Tatiana. We both can’t thank them enough. If my wife and I ever have the need for an attorney in the future, Paul will be our go-to-guy!
reviews.ownerResponse: Hi Mark. We're delighted to hear about your wife's successful SSDI case! Your determination led you here, and we're thrilled that Paul and Tatiana's efforts and compassion made all the difference. Your trust in us is greatly appreciated, and we're here for you whenever you need legal support in the future!

reviews.text: I had never applied for any kind of benefits before, but after being turned down twice for Social Security Disability, I decided I needed a lawyer if I was to continue. My husband and I called over 15 lawyers and due to the unique circumstances of my case, every one of them turned me down. Then we called Paul Dombeck. He was sympathetic to my situation and although he knew it would be a challenge, he agreed to take me on. I had a court hearing the beginning of December and yesterday I got my first check. We won! Thank you Paul, I know I couldn’t have done it without you and this will make a tremendous difference to my life. So, if you have given up hope on finding a lawyer to represent you, call Paul.

reviews.text: After careful research, I retained The Law Office of Paul J. Dombeck PLLC.,  to represent me in a LTD case. They represented me twice. I liked the staff and felt most comfortable with them immediately, which was very important to me.  During my initial consultation, they listened carefully to my concerns and addressed the factors of my particular case.  Like many cases, I waited and hoped for the best outcome.  I was very confident in their expertise and professionalism and left it all up to their team.  I was always aware of what was taking place regarding my case, as well as being proactive as it progressed.  They took a personal approach in having me speak with the same representative each time, never a second or third party. When I sent emails or any correspondence they were acknowledged in a timely manner. I would highly recommend "The Law Off of Paul Dombeck PLLC."  they are dedicated in getting the best results for their clients.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for the great feedback! We are thrilled to hear how happy you were with the outcome of your long-term disability case . We strive to provide high quality service and am glad to hear we succeeded.

reviews.text:
If there was a possibility to give zero stars, that's what they deserve.

It's obvious whom wears the pants at this law firm. After having me believe I had a lawyer, three months later he calls to b.s. me with some excuse that this firm is only focusing on elderly disability. With no time left to get another consult, let alone have them represent me, I was forced to handle my hearing myself.

Thank you to the woman that said my diagnosis was not "bad enough" because the word "mild" was used to describe the curvature of my cervical vertebrae reversing and the ruptured and torn disc between L-4 and L-5 was not a big deal and happens to most people with age. With documentation of a T-score showing my spine being that of an 85 year old and I had yet to reach 35.

Because of the gentleman's cowardice and the female's plain inconsiderate and rude behavior I do not have to pay them 1/3 of my pack pay after representing myself in front of the adjudication judge.

Thank you for being completely misleading and lacking any kind of conscience! You two rock at that!
reviews.ownerResponse: Jason, explaining here the reason for the time it took us to give you our decision to not represent your case would reveal confidential case information and circumstances in a public format, which we are not permitted to do. We can only convey that there was a valid and simple reason for the delay and invite you to contact us if you would like to talk about it. We congratulate you on your win, and note this is a good illustration that Social Security does not always follow a predictable model or rule regarding how they will decide an individual matter.

reviews.text: The Law Office of Paul Dombeck handled my daughter's case with the up most professionalism that we needed to deal with the Social Security Office. Paul and his team made sure we understood the procedures and letters that we were receiving as they can be very confussing at times. He did not let up when it looked like our case was not going in the right direction and that determination helped us to win our case. My daughter and I cannot say enough about the hard work this team did for us and we are truely greatful that he was our lawyer. I would use this team again and highly recommend that you contact Paul Dombeck to handle your case as well.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for the great feedback! We are thrilled to hear how happy you were with the outcome of your daughters disability case. We strive to provide high quality service and am glad to hear we succeeded.

reviews.text: An excellent  rating is not  adequate to describe the superior service I received.  I contacted Mr. Dombeck in August 2012 regarding a long term disability benefit claim denial.   During our  initial   consultation he addressed all of my concerns and told me what to expect.   Over the next seven months, he was  available to speak to me,  gave good advice and returned my phone calls and emails promptly.  He was insightful and always one step ahead of the insurance company's evasive tactics.   I have never known of an attorney to take such an active role in a case and I am confident that is why he won my settlement.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for the great feedback! We are thrilled to hear how happy you were with outcome of your long-term disability claim. We strive to provide high quality service and am glad to hear we succeeded.

reviews.text: In January of 2012, I was involved in a three car collision, in which I was rear-ended into the car in front of me.  My car was totaled and I suffered soft tissue damage that required extensive treatment.  Within 24 hours of the accident, an insurance adjuster for the responsible party called me and made a low ball offer for compensation.  A friend advised me not to accept any offers and gave me a phone number for attorney Paul Dombeck.  I was somewhat apprehensive about hiring a lawyer, as I had never before needed legal advise, but I was more nervous about handling it myself.  I found Paul to be easy to talk to and very detailed in explaining the process. He explained what I could expect from the case and what my options were.  He was responsive to my calls and kept me informed on the progress of my case.  I am very pleased with the settlement and give Paul Dombeck  high marks. I would recommend him to others without hesitation.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for the great feedback! We are thrilled to hear how happy you were with the settlement from your auto accident. We strive to provide high quality service and am glad to hear we succeeded.

reviews.text:
My husband and I were in an accident with our Semi Truck in April, 2011. We were not at fault in the accident. The other company was refusing to pay lost wages and down time. As we are members of PrePaid Legal, we were referred to the Law Office of Paul Dombeck. I was pleased that we didn't have to go through the yellow pages. It was surprising how easy it was to turn everything over to Mr. Dombeck and let him and his associates handle the other insurance company. Mr. Dombeck was right on top of everything and were we able to settle this dispute without going to court. It was a long drawn out battle but this type of thing usually is.
If I had another incident that requires and attorney, I wouldn't hesitate to call Mr. Dombeck for help.

reviews.text:
Seventeen months ago I was involved in an automobile accident. All I cared about was the hospital bill being resolved which, you would think would be fairly easy between my automobile coverage and my health insurance coverage. Well, not so much. After telling the insurance representative several times that if things continued as they were, I was going to contact an attorney, I did.
My Neighbor recommended Perez Law Group and I'm glad he did.
I had two phone calls, a couple of emails, two in person meetings and within 6 weeks or so, DONE! Everything finalized and closed out, including the $143,000 hospital bill!
Kelly was the one that we had 99 percent of our contact with and she was great. Professional yet personable. She had no issues taking a little extra time to explain things to my wife and I in layman's terms. She was truly a genuine pleasure to work with.
We will be returning to have Steve and Kelly handle some of our domestic legal matters we would like to have done.
Would I recommend Perez Law Group? I already have after the first in person meeting.
I'm old school, I remember when doctors and attorneys didn't advertise. For me, the GOOD Ones won't have their images plastered on billboards or on the sides of busses.
They don't have to; their work speaks for itself. As does Perez Law Group's.

Jeffrey Wolfe with Perez Law Group was outstanding to work with. He was extremely professional, knowledgeable, and always stayed on top of everything throughout our case. He took the time to walk us through our options and made sure we fully understood each step of the process. Communication was great, and we always felt supported and well-represented. I truly appreciate his guidance and would highly recommend him to anyone looking for a reliable and experienced attorney.

reviews.text: John is my go to for any criminal allegations in Phoenix. His Phoenix Criminal Defense is top tier, as he truly cares about his clients. Caring is priceless in this line of work because the government can be ruthless and telling his clients stories is invaluable in his pursuit to justice. I recommend John for anyone in need of criminal defense.
Couldn't be more thankful to had this man represent us.Thank you for all your hard and dedicated work during my trial ♥️

John Phebus was incredible to work with. He explained everything clearly, stayed responsive, and made a stressful situation much easier to handle. His professionalism and experience really showed, and the outcome of my case was better than I expected. His staff was also friendly and organized. I highly recommend him to anyone needing a dependable attorney. Happy Holidays
reviews.ownerResponse:

We hope you have a wonderful holiday season!

Warm regards,
The Law Offices of John Phebus

reviews.text: Andre and his team are amazing to work with! Andre is incredibly knowledgeable and takes the time to explain everything thoroughly and in a way that is easy to understand.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Thank you so much for your kind words. That truly means a lot.

We believe estate planning and wealth strategy should never feel confusing or overwhelming. Taking the time to clearly explain the “why” behind the structure is just as important as drafting the documents themselves. When clients understand their plan, they feel confident — and that’s our goal.

It was an honor to work with you, and we appreciate the trust you placed in our team. We’re always here for you whenever you need us.

reviews.text: The Pennington staff is very professional and  efficient. I had a virtual meeting with Mr Pennington who helped me with my estate planning. He was friendly and answered all my questions in a timely manner.He was able to provide a completed Trust in just a few days. I highly recommend him for your Trust lawyer.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you, Jan! I’m so glad that we could make the process easy for you. We are always here for questions!
Thank you, Dave!

reviews.text: Pennington Law did a great job on my Trust. The entire staff was very knowledgeable and helpful every step of the way. They did both a Trust and Will and explained why both were needed. I put off getting a Trust for years. They made it so easy, I should have done it sooner. I highly recommend Pennington Law.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Thank you so much for your kind words and for trusting Pennington Law with your estate plan.

We hear this all the time — “I should have done this sooner.” The truth is, most families delay because the process feels overwhelming. Our job is to make it clear, efficient, and actually empowering. I’m glad our team was able to walk you through why both a Trust and a Will matter and make the process smooth from start to finish.

Estate planning isn’t just documents — it’s protecting your family, reducing future stress, and creating clarity. That’s what we care about.

We truly appreciate your recommendation and the opportunity to serve you. If you ever need updates or have questions down the road, we’re always here.
Thank you, Ishaa!

reviews.text: The Andre Pennington, Esq. team is an exceptional law firm specializing in estate planning. We found everyone to be very friendly and hospitable. They were spot on while addressing our specific needs. The firm has locations that are easily accessible in the west valley as well as Verrado. We were very pleased with our experience from the very beginning and very pleased with service that we received. I highly recommend Andre Pennington Law for your estate planning needs. Andre is well versed in multiple aspects and nuances of the laws governing personal assets in this new age we are living in.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you, Micah! 🫶🏽

reviews.text: These guys may not be the cheapest, but they did a great job for us. They asked a lot of questions, so the first draft was pretty close. I made the corrections on line. Then I went in and watched them being made and we signed the docs. A couple weeks later we picked up the nicely bound, final documents. They also were on top of getting our health wishes posted on the Arizona registry. They were always friendly and accommodating! My sister used a less expensive provider and wasted a lot of time to get a much poorer result!
reviews.ownerResponse:
You captured our process perfectly—taking the time upfront to ask the right questions, collaborating with you on refinements, and making sure everything is done correctly the first time. Estate planning should never feel rushed or generic, and we’re glad you experienced the value of a careful, hands-on approach.

We’re especially happy to hear you noticed the details, from the real-time updates during signing to the final bound documents and ensuring your health care directives were properly uploaded to the Arizona registry. Those follow-through steps matter, and they’re often what protect families when it counts most.

Thank you for trusting us and for recognizing the difference between simply getting documents done and getting them done right. We’re grateful to work with clients like you and are always here if you need us in the future.

reviews.text: Pennington Law is a great place to go to for estate planning. They are very professional, thorough and referred us to other businesses that helped in completing this objective. This was a very good and helpful experience. Thank you all!
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you, Dawn! We are always here to help!
Thank you, Romel!

reviews.text: THE MOST COMPETENT PATIENT AND CARING PEOPLE I HAVE EVER HAD THE PLEASURE OF WORKING WITH. I AM SO HAPPY WITH EVERY DETAIL THEY TOOK CARE OF WITH MY TRUST LEAVING ME FEELING VERY SECURE AND CONFIDENT.

reviews.text: There is no appropriate way to express my deep appreciation for Pennington Law,  and Ms. Karrie and Ms. Kendra.  ( I hope I have the names spelled correctly.)    My husband and I did all estate planning through Pennington Law, inclusive of new trusts and wills.  The team was so excellent and created an outstanding, easily understood product.  Pennington Law actually went above and beyond excellent, especially given that the whole topic is a challenging one to discuss at best.   They were efficient, explained everything so it could be well understood, and even made it comfortable, enjoyable given the topic.  Their expertise and knowledge helped put our financial affairs in order.  Recently,   about 4 years after our trusts and wills, my husband passed away totally unexpected.  Ms. Karrie and Ms. Kendra could NOT have been more compassionate, kind, empathetic, and extremely helpful,  in what was the worst time for our family.  They took all my phone calls and questions that followed.   Both Karrie and Kendra provided guidance, calm,  and a direction for solution.   I can't tell you how much that meant.   Their brilliant advice simplified the situation... their kindness brought peace of mind.   Karrie and Kendra were supportive, protective, and truly, truly cared.   I was stunned, and more grateful than I could ever express.   5 stars are not enough.   Anyone considering estate planning needs to call Pennington Law first.  From this experience I learned that in my humble opinion there is more to law than law.  There are also the people it impacts, the value of being heard, understood  and helped within what the law allows, and the empathy and compassion that is priceless during more difficult times.  This is a 10 star office.   Kendra and Karrie, I will always be grateful.
reviews.ownerResponse: Cheri, thank you so much for the kind words, and Karrie and Kendra are absolutely amazing and we are glad that you had a wonderful experience at our office. 🙏🏽

reviews.text: My partner was concerned that I didn't have anything in place if something happened to me. He answered all my question in language I could understand. After I pondered, I decided to make another appointment with Josh. We went through the questionnaire and I made the decision to go for the Trust and everything else. The cost is very reasonable. After the draft was sent to me, I made the appointment to sign the documents. Joshua Love is a caring, courteous and professional lawyer and I recommend him and the Pennington Law firm for your Trust or Will!!

I missed a hearing because I did something wrong and was not notified, and started to spiral.  Again, I contacted so many attorneys for consults.  This case was 5 years old, and the size of a mountain and Randal said YES!  He fought for me, and when we there were things he wasn't sure he could handle himself...he brought on another attorney at no additional charge to me!  Together, these two were my warriors and super heroes!  Finally, after 7 years...my case is done and favorable!  I cannot thank Randal Hutson enough for taking that chance on me and fighting for what was right!

reviews.text: Wayne Marsh has been to most effective, competent, and prompt lawyer I have ever dealt with.  And he’s a pleasure to talk to! My Mom lived in Canada, and owned a second house in Arizona for the winter.  When she died, we were at a loss how to sell the house, both finding an real estate agent, and dealing with all the paperwork.  The paperwork is extra complex for Canadian selling a US house, but Wayne knew what to do.  He dealt with the probate court, found us a wonderful real estate agent, and handled all the paperwork.  He also handled the paperwork to sell the car,, cancel the home and car insurance, and dealt with the local bank.  Hard to believe but dealing with the insurance companies and the bank was the most complex part of the work.  But he did it, and did it well, thoroughly and promptly.  He didn’t have to spend billing time researching what to do.  He handled it all, and at very reasonable prices.  And every time we spoke, he was pleasant, courteous, and just a pleasure to talk to.  If you have any legal work in Arizona for an estate, probate, administration, or real estate, call Wayne.  By the way, his front office staff, and legal assistant are also great.
Mr. Wayne Marsh was very helpful, made me  feel comfortable every step of the way. Everyone in office was so nice and overall great experience.

*Greetings & Gratitude....This review is for the EXCEPTIONAL ATTORNEY...MR.WAYNE MARSH. He is THE JOHN WAYNE OF LAW. He is also kind, highly intelligent, patient, & not surprisingly resourceful. He helped me in two different states...Both of which, he is greatly revered. He is brilliant, but, communicates so, that you understand the PROCESS & PROCEDURES of your situation.
ATTORNEY MARSH is The man to TRUST with your  TRUST...
God Bless You ....

Sincerely,
Kimberley Chatman

I was so lucky to cross paths with Wayne P. Marsh. I was tasked with fiduciary responsibilities for a dying friend & I knew nothing about how to go about it.
Fortunately, through the recommendation of a mutual friend, I contacted Wayne & he walked me through all the basics, in terms I could understand, setting me up with both Legal Power of Attorney as well as Medical Power of Attorney. I had checked the going rates & Wayne was well within the reasonable parameters. What a blessing! In addition to drawing up all the necessary legal paperwork, he actually came to the signing of the documents and served as the Notary, legitimizing everything. I couldn't have asked for a better, more competent, more trustworthy lawyer.
His staff was friendly and patient and all in all, a difficult experience became a positive, worthwhile experience. I recommend Wayne P. Marsh to everyone.

This is the fourth time we have executed a living trust.  One in Utah and two different trusts in California.  And, FINALLY we are 100% satisfied!!  Darren provided us with an true education in financial planning and knowledge of how an estate plan and living trust should actually be prepared and executed.  He answered every question and attended to every detail concerning our estate.  And, not only did we work with an expert attorney we had the pleasure of working with Eastman's staff who are simply a true pleasure to work with.  If you are looking for a no-pressure firm and skillful professionals with respect to estate planning, we would highly recommend you contact Eastman. Great firm!  Great people!  Great results!  We think you will enjoy every minute of the journey.
D. Meeks & R. LaFeber

reviews.text: I've always felt uncomfortable talking about death, and I couldn't imagine the topic would be any easier to discuss in the offices of a law firm. But one of the many great things about Eastman Trusts is how comfortable the team makes the entire process. David Eastman walked my wife and me through the steps with just the right amount of detail, patience, and even humor. He kept the discussion at our pace -- never rushing, never talking down to either of us -- and he turned what could have been a sad and morbid appointment into something we've felt positive about ever since. In fact, everyone we've worked with at the firm... David, Kimber, and Donna... has been outstanding, welcoming, and professional. I wouldn't recommend dying at all, but if you plan to, I'd highly suggest meeting the team at Eastman Trusts.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you so much for sharing your experience and for your thoughtful  words!
